title: Amylotheca insularum
taxonomy: Amylotheca insularum is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Amylotheca and is native to the Pacific Islands. The classification of Amylotheca insularum places it within the order Celastrales, which is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. This classification is based on morphological and molecular characteristics that distinguish Amylotheca insularum from other species within the Celastraceae family. Further research is needed to confirm the exact relationships between Amylotheca insularum and other related species.
